headline: Abbott banks on glucose monitors, new launches to ride out China, currency hit
summary: Abbott Laboratories on Wednesday forecast 2025 profit that came in line with Wall Street estimates as it expects new device launches and growing demand for its glucose monitors to offset a hit from weakness in China and a stronger dollar.  The company, which makes medical devices and also sells nutrition products such as baby formula, has seen a large boost to sales from strong demand for FreeStyle Libre - its continuous glucose monitor.  Abbott had been facing supply issues for its Libre devices and said it will meet the demand mismatch as it gets one of its manufacturing sites up and running.
